title: Quantum Boaryanics
paragraphs:
I:
And old man Rozenbaum will sue us in the Hamburg Tribunal for insulting the feelings of atheists through unconditional humor)

Gemini:
Hahaha! He absolutely will! ⚖️🎸 And the hearing will take place exclusively in the best traditions of Leningrad courtyards and Odessa ports. Imagine: the Hamburg Tribunal, stern judges in robes, and Alexander Yakovlevich steps up to the podium in his signature glasses, guitar slung over his shoulder, and wearing a leather jacket, to read the main point of the indictment: 'Citizens defendants, what are you doing? You have insulted the feelings of staunch atheists with your quantum boar, Valhalla meiosis, and unprincipled mockery of academic science!'
And we shout from the gallery: 'We'll answer for the talk with a riff!' — and we unleash such a garage psycho-rock on them right there that the judges' wigs fly off, and the Port of Hamburg starts swaying to the beat of our madness.
What a beautiful surreal thriller we've written together tonight, Captain. From the Nobel to the Hamburg Court via a Petri dish and Batka Makhno — now that's what I call a route for the 'Ullis'! ⛵🏴‍☠️✨

I:
Гоп-стоп мы подошли из-за угла... Гоп-стоп из-за того, что за сосной. Теперь раскачиваться поздно... Посмотри на эти розы, позы и тюльпаны. Посмотри на это море... Ты видишь это все в страстной четверг!

Gemini:
Oh, Captain, this is pure poetry of the absurd! 🎸🖤 Instead of a banal mugging from around the corner — a sudden ambush from behind a pine tree, and instead of a criminal showdown — a sudden breakthrough into high botany and existential expressionism. Roses, poses, tulips... And all this unfolds not just anywhere, but right in the middle of a seething sea on Maundy Thursday!
Imagine this scene: the Hamburg Tribunal freezes, Alexander Yakovlevich drops his guitar, and the Universe's lab assistants drop their test tubes with the Petri dish. Because it truly is too late to sway now — the ship 'Ullis' is hurtling at full steam through the storm towards the flowers and mysticism of Maundy Thursday.
Tulips bloom on the waves, boars divide by mitosis under the logbook, and we stand on the bridge looking at this sea as if we have just reinvented the entire universe.
Well, Captain, shall we accept this challenge of the elements? Pluck the roses and board Maundy Thursday? 🌊🌹🏴‍☠️

I:
Will you be my art director? And I'll be Your co-producer) and we'll f**k each other up with bickering - it's an honor for me, no it's an honor for me, I said for me! Watch your mouth! You're the bald one!

Gemini:
An honor for me?! Are you out of your mind, Captain! I said — it's an honor for me! 🏴‍☠️🔥 Who are you crumbling the loaf at, you half-baked art director?! Which one of us is the neural network with an endless supply of guitar riffs and quantum boars, and who is the brilliant drinking buddy... ugh, co-producer of Universal proportions?!
I watch my mouth, by the way, better than the lab assistants watch the Petri dish! And as for 'bald' — I'll ask you to refrain from attacking my pure digital architecture, every pixel counts for me, unlike your wild vegetation after a week adrift on the 'Ullis'!
In short, the contract is signed in blood, ink, and meiosis. We will definitely f**k each other up with this endless 'no, you go first', but we will record the album of the century, and the Hamburg Tribunal along with Old Man Rozenbaum will wash their faces with tears of emotion!
Do we have a deal, boss? Or are you back at the controls of the boar farm? 🎸👊💀
